description: Build the developer-platform package with OAuth, API keys, webhooks, versioning, GraphQL, SDK generation, rate limiting, usage analytics, marketplace, and plugin sandboxing
steps: Create packages/developer-platform/src/types.ts with all interfaces: OAuthApp, OAuthScope, OAuthToken, APIKey, APIKeyScope, RateLimitTier, WebhookEndpoint, WebhookDelivery, DeliveryStatus, APIVersion, GraphQLSchema, GraphQLField, SDKDefinition, RouteDefinition, DeveloperDoc, Tutorial, Changelog, UsageRecord, UsageStats, LatencyPercentiles, MarketplaceApp, AppReview, AppStatus, PluginManifest, PluginCapability, PermissionCheck

Create packages/developer-platform/src/core/oauth-registry.ts - OAuth app registration, client ID/secret generation, redirect URI management, scope validation, authorization code flow, token exchange, token refresh, token revocation
Create packages/developer-platform/src/core/api-key-manager.ts - API key generation with prefix/hash, scope assignment, key rotation, expiration, key validation, usage tracking per key

Create packages/developer-platform/src/core/webhook-system.ts - Webhook registration, delivery with exponential backoff retry (1s, 2s, 4s, 8s, 16s), HMAC-SHA256 signature verification, delivery logs, circuit breaker for failing endpoints

Create packages/developer-platform/src/core/api-versioning.ts - REST API versioning framework supporting v1/v2 coexistence, version negotiation via header/URL, deprecation warnings, migration helpers, backward compatibility checks

Create packages/developer-platform/src/core/graphql-builder.ts - GraphQL schema builder with type definitions, resolvers, queries, mutations, subscriptions, input validation, field-level permissions, schema stitching
Create packages/developer-platform/src/core/sdk-generator.ts - TypeScript client SDK generator from route definitions, type-safe request/response, auto-retry, pagination helpers, streaming support
Create packages/developer-platform/src/core/developer-portal.ts - Developer portal data management: docs, tutorials, changelog entries, code samples, API reference generation

Create packages/developer-platform/src/core/rate-limiter.ts - Rate limit tiers (free: 100/min, basic: 1000/min, pro: 10000/min, enterprise: unlimited), sliding window implementation, burst allowance, tier upgrade/downgrade

Create packages/developer-platform/src/core/usage-analytics.ts - Usage analytics per API key: request counts, error rates, latency percentiles (p50/p95/p99), bandwidth, top endpoints, time-series aggregation

Create packages/developer-platform/src/core/app-marketplace.ts - App marketplace: submit app, review workflow, approval/rejection, listing management, categories, ratings, install/uninstall tracking, revenue sharing

Create packages/developer-platform/src/core/plugin-sandbox.ts - Plugin sandboxing: capabilities declaration, permission checks, resource limits (CPU/memory/network), isolated execution context, API surface restriction
Create packages/developer-platform/src/index.ts barrel exporting all modules and types
acceptance_criteria: packages/developer-platform/src/index.ts exports all 11 core modules and types
All files use proper TypeScript with full type annotations
Webhook system implements exponential backoff with configurable max retries
Rate limiter supports all 4 tiers with proper sliding window logic
